title: Generate an Astro Static Site for Cloudflare Workers
description: Scaffolds a static Astro site with React components deployed on Cloudflare Workers

description.description: Short human-readable description of the application

stagingDomain.description: Staging domain for wrangler.jsonc (e.g. staging.example.com). If omitted, derived from URL in root .env.

productionDomain.description: Production domain for wrangler.jsonc (e.g. example.com). If omitted, derived from URL in root .env.
